articles.title: Stock futures dip after chip-led rally; SoftBank soars 11% as Asia tech stocks rise: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Wall Street is coming off a winning day, following a jump in chipmakers and falling oil prices.

articles.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role - TechCrunch

articles.content:
Fidji Simo, OpenAI’s No. 2 executive, is stepping down from her full-time role, the Wall Street Journal reports.

articles.author: Rebecca Bellan
articles.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing - TechCrunch
articles.description: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
articles.content: OpenAI is sunsetting Atlas, the AI-powered browser it launched in October with ChatGPT at its core. But its not giving up on the idea that AI should help people browse the web. Instead, its taking so… [+1795 chars]
